prompt: Visually render 'DATA FLOW' using only ASCII characters. The text should be formed by intricate patterns of small, glowing blue angle brackets ('>'), set against the backdrop of a dark, vintage computer monitor screen, complete with subtle scanline effects and a monospace grid.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of the text 'DATA FLOW' formed entirely by intricate patterns of small, glowing blue angle brackets (>). The text should be displayed on a dark, vintage computer monitor screen, which features subtle scanline effects and a visible monospace grid.
